title: trifolium xanthinum
intro: Trifolium xanthinum, also known as the Yellow Trefoil, is a perennial plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Trifolium xanthinum include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
